_publications._publicationTitle: Establishment of immortalized murine mesothelial cells and a novel mesothelioma cell line.

_contextSnippet: No tumors developed after injection of the selected number of AK7 cells; a significantly higher number (>2 × 10^6 cells) has been reported to be required in order to induce macroscopic tumors in this experimental model
details: No tumors developed after injection of 4 × 10^5 AK7 cells; requires >2 × 10^6 cells to induce macroscopic tumors
